---
format:
  html:
    theme: [cosmo, theme.scss]
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    embed-resources: true
    title-block-banner: false
    include-in-header:
      text: '<meta name="robots" content="noindex, nofollow">'
    output-file: cv.html      # the hub owns index.html; the detailed web CV lives at /cv.html
pagetitle: "Dr Morgan John Brand — CV"
---

```{r setup}
source("R/render.R")
cv <- cv_load()
```

::: {.cv-backlink}
[morgsbrew — portfolio](index.html)
:::

::: {.cv-header}
# `r cv$basics$name` {.title}

### `r cv$basics$label`

[`r cv$meta$tagline`]{.cv-tagline}
:::

```{r results='asis'}
emit_contact_line(cv)
```

::: {.cv-downloads}
[Download 1-page résumé (PDF)](resume.pdf) · [Download academic CV (PDF)](cv.pdf) · [Machine-readable JSON](resume.json)
:::

## Summary

```{r results='asis'}
emit_summary(cv)
```

## Experience

```{r results='asis'}
emit_work(cv, "cv")
```

## Education

```{r results='asis'}
emit_education(cv, "cv")
```

## Publications

```{r results='asis'}
emit_publications(cv)
```

## Conference Presentations

```{r results='asis'}
emit_conferences(cv)
```

## Science Communication & Public Writing

```{r results='asis'}
emit_communication(cv)
```

## Skills

```{r results='asis'}
emit_skills(cv, "cv")
```

---

::: {style="font-size:0.8rem;color:#8b949e"}
Built reproducibly from a single `resume.json` (JSON Resume schema) with Quarto · version `r cv$meta$version` · last updated `r cv$meta$lastModified`.
:::
